## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run command '...'
2. Set configuration '...'
3. Execute module '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

If applicable, paste the terminal output or log trace here.

```text
[Paste logs here]
```

## Desktop / Environment:

Add any other context about the problem here.
